item.title: Item Stats
item.subtitle: Item pickup, drop and usage statistics

block.title: Block Stats
block.subtitle: Block mining and tool breakage statistics

settings.subtitle: Personalization & app info
settings.themeColorDesc: Choose your favorite theme color with instant preview
settings.navItemsDesc: Customize which items appear in the sidebar navigation
settings.chartTotalDesc: Display total data line in statistics charts by default
settings.maxLegendPlayersDesc: Maximum number of player data lines shown in charts
settings.playerFilterDesc: Filter players during data import to prevent importing bots or passersby
settings.minPlaytimeDesc: Players with playtime below this value will be filtered (whitelist players are exempt)
settings.whitelistDesc: When configured, only whitelisted players are imported; when empty, blacklist and minimum playtime apply
settings.blacklistDesc: Blacklisted players are always excluded, even if they meet the minimum playtime
settings.addPlayerPlaceholder: Enter player name, press Enter to add
settings.filterHint: Filter priority: Whitelist (always include) → Blacklist (always exclude) → Minimum playtime (filter). Adding to whitelist auto-removes from blacklist and vice versa.
settings.author: Author
settings.defaultSelectedPlayersDesc: Set players selected by default when opening stats pages; empty means all selected
settings.defaultSelectedEmpty: Not set, all players selected by default
settings.defaultSelectedHint: When configured, stats pages will select these players by default; others can still be manually checked. When empty, all players are shown by default.
settings.autoScanDesc: When enabled, automatically scans the specified server folder and imports data daily at midnight
settings.autoScanFolderDesc: Specify the server folder path for daily auto-scanning, must contain a world directory
settings.autoScanScheduleDesc: Auto scan runs daily at 00:00, data date is set to the previous day (ensures midnight scan data is not labeled as today)
settings.serverManagementDesc: Add, rename, or delete servers. Data for each server is independent.
settings.deleteServerConfirm: Delete server "{name}"? All data for this server will be permanently deleted.
settings.noServers: No servers yet. Please add one first.
settings.autoScanServerDesc: Auto-scanned data will be assigned to the selected server

dataManage.subtitle: Import and delete server statistics
dataManage.scanDateHint: Specify the data date, leave empty to auto-detect from server.properties
dataManage.batchHint: Each subfolder under the parent folder will be treated as a backup, date will be auto-detected from server.properties
dataManage.batchHintV2: Each subfolder under the parent folder will be treated as a backup, date will be auto-detected from server.properties
dataManage.batchArchiveHint: ⚠ Archive batch scanning requires extracting each file, which is slower. Folder mode is recommended
dataManage.archiveHint: ⚠ Archive import requires extraction, which is slower. Folder mode is recommended
dataManage.exportHint: Export all data from database to a JSON file for static mode usage
dataManage.selectDateRangePlaceholder: Click to select start and end dates
dataManage.deleteAllHint: This will clear all statistics data from the database. This action cannot be undone.

honor.title: Honor Titles
honor.subtitle: The strongest in each field, based on data

descs.mineGod: Most blocks mined overall — pickaxe on fire!
descs.deathMaster: Most deaths overall — VIP at the Grim Reaper's office
descs.slayerKing: Most mobs killed overall — mobs flee at the sight
descs.ironMan: Longest playtime overall — grinding till the end of time
descs.craftMaster: Most items crafted overall — the crafting table is home
descs.fisherman: Most fish caught overall — patience pays off
descs.sleepyhead: Most times slept overall — bed is best friend
descs.survivor: Highest playtime-to-death ratio — true survival master
descs.enchanter: Most items enchanted overall — enchanting table regular
descs.marathoner: Longest walk + sprint distance — measuring the world on foot
descs.diamondHunter: Most diamonds obtained today — diamond freedom achieved
descs.pvpKing: Most player kills today — ruler of the battlefield
descs.bedBreaker: Most times slept today — sleeping the day away
descs.villagerFriend: Most villager interactions today — master trader
descs.acrobat: Most jumps today — bounce bounce bounce!
descs.deepDiver: Longest swim distance today — 20,000 leagues under the sea
descs.tank: Most damage taken today — standing tall through it all
descs.treasureHunter: Most item types picked up today — collector extraordinaire
descs.speedster: Longest sprint distance today — faster than lightning
